prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4B11T (2.0L turbo from the Lancer Evolution X)** with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger**, forged internals (JE Pistons 87.5mm, Eagle H-beam rods), and a **Tomei 272° camshaft** for high-RPM power delivery. Paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting **350-400whp** on E85.

Full **custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system** by **HKS Hi-Power** with a **GReddy Revolution RS muffler** for optimized scavenging and a deep, aggressive tone. Includes a **custom front-mount intercooler (FMIC) by Mishimoto** with a **10-row core** to eliminate heat soak under sustained boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Mitsubishi-specific valving)**, **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)** for chassis rigidity, and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** to reduce body roll. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (front) with 330mm rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for track-capable stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Space Star-specific)** with aggressive front bumper, side skirts, and a **carbon fiber rear diffuser** for improved aerodynamics. Includes a **custom 3D-printed rear spoiler** (modeled after the Evo X) for downforce at speed.

**Enkei PF07 wheels (17x8 +35 offset)** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40/17)** for maximum grip. Fender flares rolled and pulled for aggressive stance without rubbing.

**Full custom widebody conversion** using **Fiberglass fenders (extended 2 inches per side)** and **carbon fiber hood (with functional vents)** from **Seibon Carbon**. Painted in **Mitsubishi Racing Lime (code: 751)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl accents** on the roof and mirrors.
